vocab.example: I would love to learn more about art to broaden my horizons and appreciate different cultural perspectives.

vocab.meaning: người am hiểu tường tận về (nghệ thuật, ẩm thực...)
vocab.example: While I’m currently an amateur, I aspire to become a bit of a connoisseur of contemporary sculpture in the future.
I am particularly keen on delving deeper into my country's artistic heritage to understand our traditional roots.
Taking a painting class would be a perfect way to unleash my creativity after years of focusing on academic subjects.
I believe that formal education in art history would significantly enhance my aesthetic appreciation when visiting museums.
I hope to attend a workshop where I can master the techniques of watercolor painting from professional artists.
Studying the lives of great painters provides a profound insight into the social issues of their respective eras.

vocab.meaning: thị trường/bối cảnh nghệ thuật sôi động
vocab.example: I plan to move to a city with a vibrant art scene to stay updated on the latest creative movements.
I find analyzing the hidden meanings behind abstract art to be incredibly intellectually stimulating.
In the future, I’d like to take a sabbatical to travel across Europe and immerse myself in its rich art history.
